ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients.text: copper complexes of chlorophylls and chlorophyllins

ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Avocado, flesh without skin, pitted, raw

ingredients_text: Corn (70%), sunflower oil and aroma with avocado flavor (6%) (rice flour, salt, spices, flavouring, sugar, acid (citric acid), dehydrated onion, dehydrated garlic, colour (copper complexes of chlorophylls and chlorophyllins), freeze dried avocado powder (0.04%) and starch)
